title: Diagnostics, Profiling, Allocation, PGO, Security Gates, and Production Defense · Language Lens: Performance Experiment Pgo
summary: A release is slow under load, grows memory, has a suspected goroutine leak, and includes a dependency advisory. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go performance experiment pgo increment in a measured production release and operations dossier. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Benchmark a representative baseline, form a causal hypothesis, inspect profiles, change one factor, validate behavior, and evaluate PGO portability.
Choose CPU, heap, block, mutex, goroutine, execution trace, metrics, logs, or debugger evidence for the observed question.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
